heading: Limitations
body:
Online Archive doesn't support the following:

- Writing to the Online Archive.

- [Storage Configuration](config-adf) or
  [view](adf-cli) the Online Archive federated database instance through
  the Atlas console, Atlas Data Federation [view](adf-cli), or Atlas Data Federation API.

- Archiving a capped collection.

- Archiving data when the total volume exceeds 2 GB per five-minute job cycle.

- Archiving data below the size of 5 MiB after 7 days. To learn more, see
  [Limitations](config-online-archive-limitations).

- [GridFS](manual/core/gridfs).

- Deleting individual documents.

> **Important:** Online Archive inherits all Atlas Data Federation limitations. This includes
> MongoDB Search pipeline stages like [$search](pipe.$search) and [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta)
> and MongoDB Vector Search pipeline stage [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch), which are not
> supported when querying archived data. For a complete list of
> unsupported features, see [Atlas Data Federation Limitations](df-limitations).
